slices.title: Remove unused to_dict method from Note model
slices.jtbd: When maintaining the codebase, I want to remove unused dead code, so that the code remains clean, maintainable, and free of unnecessary technical debt.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given the Note model in backend/models.py, When the to_dict method is removed, Then the backend tests still pass.
Given the FastAPI application, When the endpoints are queried, Then the API behavior remains unchanged as serialization relies on Pydantic schemas.
slices.sixSigmaMetric: Reduce lines of dead code by 100%
